publication.title: A Semi-Supervised Transformer-Based Deep Learning Framework for Automated Tooth Segmentation and Identification on Panoramic Radiographs

author_checkpoint.purpose: Evaluator/data-pipeline equivalence gate before any retraining claim

author_code.warning: The upstream repository evolved after publication. Current-main settings must not be assumed identical to publication settings without a recorded discrepancy audit.

current_reduced_baseline.dataset: Teeth Segmentation on Dental X-ray Images

G0_reduced_baseline_integrity.requirement: Existing measured outputs, manifests, figures and package are internally consistent.

G1_official_checkpoint_equivalence.requirement: Run the official author checkpoint on the exact 191-image paper test set using a publication-compatible evaluator.
G1_official_checkpoint_equivalence.claim_enabled: Evaluation/data pipeline reproduces published checkpoint performance

G2_method_faithfulness.requirement: Architecture, class mapping, preprocessing, augmentation, labeled/unlabeled/test identities, teacher-student schedule, pseudo-label rules, optimizer, LR schedule and evaluator are frozen and documented against the publication-era method.

G3_training_reproduction.requirement: At least one full paper-faithful training run completes from declared initialization and passes the same evaluator. For stability claims, run at least three declared seeds.

forbidden_until_G1: same exact results as the paper
claim_policy.required_language_for_current_baseline: Measured reduced-scale re-simulation; not numerically equivalent to the published full-scale experiment.
